_meta.phase: 1 — INVENTORY ONLY (no code changes; review and sign off before Phase 2)

sourcing_modes.STP+anchor: STP with curated pre-history anchor stitched on for series with short vendor history.
sourcing_modes.derived: Derived from another element registered in this manifest.
sourcing_modes.computed: Computed in-house from raw vendor input(s); reference the script.

status_legend.live: Producer running on schedule; consumers rendering current values.
status_legend.live-no-cron: Producer exists but is not on a scheduled trigger.
status_legend.stale: Producer exists and ran at some point but freshness chip would be amber/red today.
status_legend.broken: Producer or consumer is wired but errors out / returns nothing.
status_legend.stub: Code exists but always returns empty/placeholder.
status_legend.unused: Element produced or hook fetches but no consumer surface renders it.
status_legend.unmounted: Consumer component exists but no route mounts it.

phase4_schema_changes: Added release_calendar (nyse-trading-day | us-business-day | wall-clock) per element.
Added dependencies array (upstream element IDs) per element; non-empty for derived/composite/scenario rollups.
Recalibrated freshness_sla_hours per Joe sign-off 2026-05-01: daily=25, weekly=192, monthly=816, quarterly=2496.
Registered 2 previously-uninventoried derived elements (cfnai_3ma, m2_yoy) — gap surfaced during dep mapping.

2026-05-03: Daily SLA recalibrated 25h→49h to absorb FRED T+1 publish lag plus weekend rollover. Joe directive 2026-05-03: 'I only want to know when something breaks. No reds on weekends/holidays for legit-cadence elements.'

2026-05-03 (b): Monthly SLA 816h→1200h, Quarterly SLA 2496h→3600h, term_premium reclassified daily→weekly. Reason: FRED publishes monthlies ~3-4 weeks after period end and quarterlies up to 10 weeks after; previous SLAs flipped chips red while FRED was operating on its normal schedule.

phase4_v11_inventory_pr2a_2026_05_01.reason: v11 Cycle Mechanism page (public/MacroTilt_Macro_Overview_Page_v11.html) renders 22 indicators across 6 mechanism modals; ~half were unregistered AND showing hardcoded mock values. PR #2A formally inventories them with current_status=placeholder_hardcoded so they appear in the manifest as known gaps. PR #2B will wire the ones with free public sources.

phase4_pr2b_wire_2026_05_01.reason: PR #2B wires 10 of the 11 v11 mechanism placeholders to live free public sources (FRED + CBOE + FINRA + Yahoo + computed proxies). cdx_basis points to hy_ig_ratio as practical proxy; xccy_basis remains TBD pending FRED-derivable approximation in PR #2C.

phase4_pr2c_audit_catchup_2026_05_02.reason: PR #2A audit missed 2 v11 mechanism indicators (sofr_ois, naaim) and did not record v11 mechanism participation in consumer_surfaces for ~13 existing indicators. PR #2C closes both gaps.

_meta.last_change: 2026-05-27 — renamed 11 manifest `name` fields to match producer-side pipeline_health indicator_ids (massive-eod, massive-universe, massive-ticker-details, massive-corporate-actions, latest_scan, scenarios, v10_allocation, uw-universe-snapshots). Closes the site-wide red-chip regression where chips found no pipeline_health row for the renamed elements. Paired with the watchdog edge function patch that writes data_as_of on every run.

elements.description: 10Y-2Y Treasury slope (bps) — recession early-warning gauge.
elements.source_endpoint: Treasury.gov daily yield curve (10Y minus 2Y, ×100 → bps)
elements.failure_mode: Workflow raises StalenessError if Treasury.gov fetch returns no fresh observation. Was on FRED T10Y2Y until 2026-05-27 — migrated to Treasury.gov for same-day publication.

elements.name: real_rates
elements.description: 10-year TIPS real yield (%) — risk-free real rate.
elements.failure_mode: Workflow raises StalenessError if Treasury.gov fetch returns no fresh observation. Was on FRED DFII10 until 2026-05-27 — migrated to Treasury.gov for same-day publication (FRED DFII10 published ~20:00 UTC, after our morning workflow; Treasury.gov publishes ~16:00 ET, captured by our afternoon workflow).

elements.failure_mode: Workflow raises StalenessError if either Treasury.gov input is missing. Was on FRED T10YIE (which is just DGS10 − DFII10) until 2026-05-27 — migrated to in-house compute from Treasury.gov for same-day publication.

elements.description: Daily refresh of the 6 v11 cycle mechanism scores. Each scored 0-100; bands 0-25 Risk On, 25-50 Neutral, 50-75 Caution, 75-100 Risk Off.
elements.source_vendor: derived from FRED + CBOE + ICE BofA + Shiller

elements.name: v10_allocation
elements.description: v10.2 Asset Tilt allocator output. The asset-class split (equity %, defensive %, defensive-sleeve composition) is read from the 2-axis MacroTilt engine (macrotilt_engine.json); the 6 cycle mechanisms drive only the sector / industry-group tilts. Leverage 1.25x in calm regimes; all 4 hard caps enforced. Produces today recommended allocation: equity %, defensive %, leverage, 11 sectors, 24 industry groups, contribution matrix.
elements.sourcing_mode: derived from macrotilt-engine-daily (equity/defensive split + defensive sleeve) and cycle-mechanism-board-daily (sector/IG tilts)
consumer_surfaces: src/App.jsx home Asset Tilt preview card

elements.name: macrotilt_engine
elements.description: MacroTilt 2-axis regime engine snapshot. Weekly regime call (stress state, MOVE percentile, yield regime, equity %, defensive sleeve) plus a daily-moving live ΔY-3M display value (delta_y_3m_bp_live / live_as_of) so the dial headline updates every trading day.
consumer_surfaces: src/App.jsx home Asset Tilt preview tile
scripts/compute_v10_allocation.py (v10 allocator — reads equity %, defensive %, active_sleeve_composition for the Recommended Allocations asset-class split)
elements.registered_note: The regime CALL inside the snapshot rebalances weekly (Friday close); the snapshot also carries delta_y_3m_bp_live + live_as_of, a daily-moving display value. Freshness chips grade against live_as_of. SLA is 120h (not 49h) because live_as_of tracks the latest FRED DGS10 print, which lags 1-2 business days behind the engine run; with the us-business-day calendar plus a Friday-run / Monday-look gap a perfectly healthy feed can read ~110h old. 120h absorbs that without false-reds while a genuine multi-day engine outage still trips red. Do not tighten below ~108h.

elements.name: scenario_definitions
elements.description: Canonical list of the 8 historical shock scenarios (Black Monday '87 through AI Correction '24) — id, name, peak window, peak drawdown, regime call, and one-line blurb. Stable academic references; the Scenarios page reads this list to render the picker and per-scenario header.
elements.source_vendor: n/a (curated by Data Steward + Senior Quant)
elements.refresh_trigger: Manual PR by Data Steward when a new scenario is added

consumer_surfaces.tile: Scenario picker + per-scenario header card + blurb

_known_gaps_surfaced_in_phase1: G1. compute_composite_history.py has no scheduled GH workflow. Bug #1036 root cause. Composites RL/GR/IR + SPX/DJI/NDX overlays are append-only and only run when somebody manually invokes the script. MUST wire to INDICATOR-REFRESH or its own daily workflow in Phase 3.

G2. CAPE / ISM / Bank Unrealized Losses are hardcoded constants in fetch_history.py + fetch_indicators.py. Stale-by-design. Phase 2: replace with live FRED/multpl/ISM/FDIC source or remove from indicator panel.
G3. USD source mismatch: fetch_history.py uses FRED DTWEXBGS while fetch_indicators.py uses Yahoo DX-Y.NYB. PR #121 fixed live tick, history may still misalign. Phase 2 spot-check.

G4. SCAN_345PM_WEEKDAYS.yml filename says 345PM but `name:` field says 330PM and DST gate fires at 15:30 ET. Misleading filename — rationalize naming convention in Phase 3 (<category>-<element>-<cadence>).

G5. trigger-workflow edge function allowlist hardcoded to SCAN/INDICATOR-REFRESH/UNIVERSE_SNAPSHOT — does NOT include MASSIVE-DAILY.yml that mig 034 cron tries to dispatch. Either function source has been hot-patched in deployment or pg_cron job 034 will silently no-op. Verify.

G6. generate-commentary cron source unknown. Source comment says 23:00 ET but no cron.schedule() in committed migrations. Either Supabase Studio direct entry, Cowork task, or unwired. Phase 2 confirm.

G7. sector_commentary writes null with reason='sector_rank_history_not_wired'. The downstream table never got created. Sector Outlook blurb shows nothing. Phase 2: either wire sector_rank_history or remove the tile.
G8. ScenarioAnalysis.jsx + scenario_allocations.json + scenario_calibration/*.json are a fully-built unmounted feature tree. Either ship the page or kill the producer chain.
G9. portfolio_history pg_cron writes daily NAV per account but no UI consumes the data. Either ship Portfolio Insights time-series view or pause the cron.
G10. ZeroHedge Premium $300/yr is being charged with stub code returning []. RED kill candidate (Phase 5).
G11. All workflows fail silently — no `if: failure()` step, no Slack/email/PagerDuty wire-in. Per project memory, failure-alert was claimed shipped 2026-04-28 but verification needed.

G12. Daily intraday clock-sequenced chain (15:30 SCAN → 15:45 UNIVERSE → 15:50 EVENTS) has no `needs:` or workflow_run dependency — relies on 15-minute clock buffer. Saturday weekly chain (12:00 V9 → 13:30 SCENARIO) has 90-minute buffer. Phase 3 normalize: either explicit dependency or single window.

G13. Two `LESSONS.md` references in project_instructions, but file does not exist in the repo. The corrections live only in Joe's auto-memory. Phase 2: create LESSONS.md and migrate auto-memory rules into it (binding, in-repo).

G14. Phase 1 inventory missed 2 derived monthly indicators (cfnai_3ma, m2_yoy) referenced by composite-gr/ir; registered in PR #13. Atomic FRED CFNAI and M2SL series are still not inventoried as separate elements — Phase 5 follow-up.

G16. v11 mechanism modals (Macro Overview iframe) render 11 indicators with hardcoded mock values: erp, buffett, ig_oas, hy_ig_ratio, fra_ois, cdx_basis, xccy_basis, real_fedfunds, margin_debt, put_call, spx_200dma, adv_dec. All 11 registered in PR #2A with current_status=placeholder_hardcoded. PR #2B will wire the 8 with free public sources (erp, buffett, ig_oas, hy_ig_ratio, real_fedfunds, margin_debt, put_call, spx_200dma, adv_dec); 3 require paid feeds (fra_ois, cdx_basis, xccy_basis) — kept as placeholders pending vendor decision.

G17. Initial v11 audit (PR #2A) missed 2 indicators: sofr_ois (Funding mechanism) and naaim (Positioning & Breadth). Both registered in PR #2C. sofr_ois wired to FRED SOFR-DFF. naaim flagged as placeholder pending scraper or vendor decision. Also surfaces a naming clash: v11 HTML uses `hy_oas` and `hy_ig` (ratio) while manifest uses `hy_ig` (spread) and `hy_ig_ratio` (ratio) — needs reconciliation in a follow-up cleanup PR.

G18. PR #371 wired several v11 indicators to wrong FRED series (BAMLC0A0CM instead of BAA-DGS10; WILL5000PR instead of NCBCEL; SP500_PE_RATIO instead of derived 1/CAPE). PR α corrects all to match methodology-v11.md exact specifications. ic4wsa + bkx_spx_v11 added as parallel pulls (Senior Quant deferral on ICSA-vs-IC4WSA and KBE/SPY-vs-^BKX/^GSPC remains). put_call/margin_debt/adv_dec downgraded to placeholder_hardcoded — their public free URLs are blocked or deprecated; needs vendor or scraper.

G19. PR β wired CAPE to live multpl.com scrape (1864 rows of monthly Shiller data going back to 1871 — replaces 31-row interpolated hardcoded anchor). ISM + bank_unreal still hardcoded; flagged needs-paid-feed and needs-FDIC-scraper respectively. Both have explicit CRITICAL DECISION ITEM notes in failure_mode.

G20. PR γ removed composite_rl/gr/ir entries from manifest (deprecated per Joe directive 2026-04-30, item #1 of 12-PR sequence). The composite_history_daily.json + composite_weights.json + composite_event_markers.json artifacts are KEPT in /public/ because asset_allocation/compute.py + asset_allocation/pipeline.py + compute_v9_allocation.py + src/lib/portfolioReturns.js still consume them. Full kill (archive compute_composite_history.py + delete JSONs) is deferred until the Asset Tilt rebuild rewires those consumers — the "Under construction" tile on Home will close that loop.

G21. PR ζ rewires put_call + adv_dec + spx_200dma + margin_debt to data we already pay for instead of broken free public URLs. put_call aggregates from UW universe_snapshots (sum put_volume / call_volume across ~1700 tickers × 3 snapshots/day). adv_dec via Postgres RPC compute_advance_decline_50d() over Polygon prices_eod. spx_200dma via Postgres RPC compute_breadth_above_200dma() over Polygon prices_eod (currently returns empty until 200d history accumulates per ticker — falls back to SPY single-ticker proxy). margin_debt via FINRA monthly statistics page scrape (Mon-YY regex). cdx_basis renders hy_ig_ratio as practical proxy. xccy_basis remains placeholder. ISM PMI source still blocked: FRED removed all ISM series in 2024, ismworld.org is paid; need Joe to confirm free source.

G22. PR θ wires ISM Manufacturing PMI to a TradingEconomics scrape after FRED removed all ISM data in 2024. Joe approved 2026-05-02. If scrape fails, the freshness chip turns red and auto-bug fires after 2 consecutive misses (closing the loop on Joe directive that the chip system is the watchdog).

G23. PR ι wires NAAIM Exposure Index to public weekly survey table at naaim.org/programs/naaim-exposure-index/. Test scrape returns 10 weekly rows (Mar 4 → Apr 29 2026). Fragility: if NAAIM changes page structure, chip goes stale.

G24. PR κ — manifest cleanup. usd entry corrected to reflect both producers now use DX-Y.NYB (USD source unification, item #5 of approved sequence, complete). bank_unreal entry annotated with FDIC API surface limitation finding — public /banks/financials endpoint does not expose AOCIROCEH (returned 0 for all banks queried); proper scraper needs the QBP press release HTML or different API endpoint discovery.

G25. PR λ — composite full kill executed per Joe directive 2026-05-02. compute_composite_history.py archived to scripts/_archive/. Three composite JSONs deleted from public/. INDICATOR-REFRESH composite recompute step removed. v9 asset_allocation/* readers wrapped in try/except (return None / skip if file missing) — v9 is dormant pending Asset Tilt rebuild. Edge fn pipeline-health-check returns empty array on composite 404 (graceful). bank_unreal flipped to live_manual_quarterly per Joe directive — Joe pastes one new QBP number per quarter into _bank_unreal_fallback_quarterly().
